message.content:
@startuml
title Create User Profile

actor User
participant "API Gateway" as AG
participant "Auth-Service" as AS
participant "User-Service" as US

User -> AG : POST /api/users
AG -> AS : check authorization
AS -> AG : http_status: 200
AG -> US : POST /api/users
US -> AG : http_status: 200
AG -> User : profile created..

@enduml
